value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Ground truth is the next experiment, not a regulator</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="500" x="295" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="toptag" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3f6b00;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">more rope · looser gate · explore</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="300" x="215" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#eaf3d6;strokeColor=#76b900;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Propose candidates</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="170" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Score vs. constraints</b><br></font><span style="color: rgb(91, 103, 112);"><font style="font-size: 12px;">drug-likeness · synthesis · off-targets</font></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="230" x="250" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#eaf3d6;strokeColor=#76b900;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Keep the best</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="520" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#e3f1f3;strokeColor=#2f8f9d;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Chemist · the assay decides</b><br></font><span style="color: rgb(47, 116, 128);"><font style="font-size: 13px;">a lighter human gate</font></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="250" x="800" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" edge="1" parent="1" source="n1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" edge="1" parent="1" source="n2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="n3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" edge="1" parent="1" source="n3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5b6770;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="n4" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">ranked shortlist</font>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0769" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop" edge="1" parent="1" source="n3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#76b900;strokeWidth=2;curved=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#3f6b00;" target="n1" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">iterate freely — a miss costs a synthesis, not a patient</font>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0135" y="10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="580" y="250" /> <mxPoint x="125" y="250" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="caution" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f5f7f9;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;fontColor=#5b6770;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Still traceable — a chemist asks why — and still watched, so it cannot just game its own scoring function.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="1010" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
